title: Heartbeat tick on file-change burst

dimensions.description: Did the runner emit exactly one autonomy event with outcome=completed?
Were the two file-change events processed in a single tick (eventsProcessed=2)?
If flag flipped off mid-burst, does the runner emit a gated event and drop pending events?
On suspendForShutdown, does the runner refuse new ticks within 100ms?

_runner_status: TODO — runner ships with T6 / Tier-wide regression sweep. JSON shape is the contract.
